description_long: This shotgun features a tactical, modern design with a predominantly black and green camouflage finish. The receiver and barrel are accented with a digital green camo pattern, while the handguard and stock are matte black. The weapon has a full-length Picatinny rail on top for mounting optics or accessories, and the barrel is relatively long with a visible front sight. The magazine is curved and detachable, suggesting a high-capacity, semi-automatic or tactical style. The stock is adjustable and robust, with a pistol grip for improved handling and control.
description: A modern, tactical shotgun with a black and green camouflage finish, featuring a full stock, pistol grip, and detachable magazine.
description_view_0: The shotgun is seen from a front angle, highlighting the muzzle, front sight, and the green camo pattern along the barrel.
description_view_1: A clear side profile reveals the full length of the shotgun, the Picatinny rail, curved magazine, and the adjustable stock.
description_view_2: The rear angle emphasizes the stock, pistol grip, and the back of the receiver, with the camo pattern visible on the stock.
description_view_3: A rear-side view shows the stock, grip, and the side of the magazine, with the camo pattern continuing along the body.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, with a long, vented barrel and visible front sight
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
